title: Unique Classes
description: Unique and different classes that vary from acrobatics to even the use of magical power!
body:
You need the **Origins** mod for this to work. Just a reminder.
This addon goes best with my other addon, [Unique Origins](https://modrinth.com/datapack/unique-origins)!
**Newest version features four Classes!**

---

**Acrobat Class**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- (+) Can jump higher than usual
- (+) Can cushion their fall, making them take much less fall damage!
- (+) Can move faster than usual

</details>
 

**Diver Class**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- (+) Can hold respiration for longer
- (+) Can swim moderately faster than other
- (+) Takes much less damage from drowning
  
</details>

**Sorcerer Class**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- (+) Resistant against all types of direct and indirect magic!
- (+) Drinking any kind of potion gives regeneration
- (+) XP gained is more than normal!
- (+) Can sense entities that are in fire, standing in soul soil or are invisible!

</details>
 

**Medic Class**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- (+) Able to use paper to heal himself and others!
- (+) Able to use glowstone dust to clear status effects off himself and off others!

</details>


**How to Install**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
1. Go into the "Singleplayer" menu.
2. Select the world you want this to be installed to and press the "edit" button.
3. Click on the "Open World Folder" button.
4. Open the "datapacks" folder.
5. Put the extracted files of the "zip" file in there.
6. The installation is complete.

_For a server / Multiplayer:_

1. Open the "world" folder of the world that you want the datapack installed onto.
2. Open the "datapacks" folder.
3. Put the extracted files of the "zip" file in there.
4. Restart the Server, you can do this by typing the command /reload in chat. (In some cases, it is preferable to completely reload the server by closing it and reopening it!)
5. The installation is complete.

</details>

I'm probably going to keep adding new, unique, classes. So stay tuned!
Donations are greatly appreciated!
